programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: In Northern California, a fire rages in the middle of the night. A woman's charred body is discovered in the smoldering aftermath.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Photography has long been a vital tool in homicide investigations. A single image captures enough information to identify a suspect, and to preserve a vital clue long after a witness' memory fades.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: When abduction turns to murder, forensic science is the only key to finding justice for the victims of a kidnapper's deadly intentions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: The forces of nature can reduce a body to bones in a matter of weeks. Using a unique combination of art and science, forensic anthropologists give victims a face long after they have been forgotten.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: What does it take to prove murder if the victim cannot be found? Investigators must go to extreme lengths to catch the killer when the victim is presumed dead.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Anytime, anywhere, people disappear – kidnapped from their daily routines. Predators always leave clues behind, but chasing them takes time, hampering investigators' attempts to solve these fatal abductions.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Poison is an almost invisible form of death, and toxicologists must look for hidden clues in blood and tissue to bring these murders to light.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: At the scene of a murder, sometimes the victim provides the only clues to their killer. Forensic anthropologists use skeletal remains to decipher the clues written in the bones.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Explosives Investigations: The crime lab is the place where science meets murder. In New York State, Eleanor Fowler opened a small package, which as mailed to her home. When she lifted the lid the box exploded killing her instantly.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Arson Investigation: Insurance torchings, mob burnouts and arson murders: these crimes are designed to take all clues with them. But a solid case can be built from a heap of ashes.

programme.title: The New Detectives: Stolen Youths
programme.desc: A young girl playing in her yard in Spokane, Washington suddenly vanishes. In St. Louis another girl leaves to visit a friend. She never arrives.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: An abandoned car outside Philadelphia brings heartbreak to a family and terror to a community. A young woman is dead, the killer gone. But the marks of his passage remain.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Forensic Entomology: Bugs have roamed the earth for 250 million years, but their intimate association with death is just now coming to life.

programme.title: The New Detectives
programme.desc: Investigators are always on the cutting edge of new forensic techniques that can help them solve cases more accurately. An experimental “brain fingerprinting” technique has already won the acquittal of a police officer accused of a drug charge.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas makes a life-or-death decision when Micah is held hostage and the kidnappers demand the release of a notorious outlaw.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas tries to do a good deed for the old town drunk but it backfires when the drunk's son believes he inherited Lucas' ranch.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A dance hall singer asks Lucas to care for her daughter in an effort to hide the baby from her self-righteous, bigoted father.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas becomes involved in a battle between an aspiring writer and a cocky, bragging trail boss.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark runs away from home after his father questions his story about overhearing a plot to rob the bank.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A famous buffalo hunter tries to goad Lucas into a shooting match. When Lucas refuses, he becomes the new target.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a stranger arrives to marry the town spinster, two brothers who want her land try to discourage him with threats and a beating.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Mark finds himself in grave danger when two unscrupulous detectives searching for a man's long-lost son claim that it's Mark.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas is drawn to a young widow passing through town on her way to claim an inheritance but others who covet it are trying to kill her.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After a young stablehand kills a notorious gunslinger, he is baffled by the hostility of the townspeople about giving him the reward.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: When a horse dealer transporting a prize stallion stops in North Fork, two saddle tramps try to use trickery to obtain it.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An elderly couple moves to North Fork under an assumed name to hide the fact that they are the parents of a vicious killer. The plan backfires when the son shows up at their home.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After foiling a girl's attempt to rob the general store, Lucas finds that she and her brother are plotting the murder of their abusive stepfather.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: A condemned killer being transported by train murders a marshal and takes Mark hostage.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: Lucas and Marshall Torrance get into trouble with the Army when they try to help a wounded young soldier who deserted.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: After Mark contracts typhoid fever and has a vision of his dead mother he no longer seems interested in getting well.

programme.title: The Rifleman
programme.desc: An old friend of Lucas's returns to town in the company of a shady gambler and is accused of cheating at cards.

programme.desc: When Lucas hires an ex-con as a ranch hand, the man is the first one under suspicion when a robbery and murder occur in the area.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: At a prominent club in Washington, D.C., a socialite argues about whether it would be possible to change history by traveling back in time. When he leaves the club he finds himself in 1865, on the night that President Lincoln will be shot.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A used car salesman buys a car that dooms him to tell only the truth.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a woman investigates a clamor on the roof of her rural house, she discovers a small UFO and little aliens emerging from it. Or so it seems.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Gaining telepathic abilities when his coin lands on its edge bank clerk Hector B. Poole learns about the difference between other people's plans and fantasies.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: While in the hospital recovering from overwork, Liz Powell keeps dreaming about going down to the hospital morgue.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Passing through the sound barrier a commercial airliner inadvertently travels back in time.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A timid vacuum-cleaner salesman is given the strength of 300 men by some experimenting aliens.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: An old radio is taking bitter bachelor Ed Lindsay back to a happier time before what he considers worthless tripe on television when he starts picking up radio programs from the 1930's and 1940's.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A compulsive gambler cajoles his friend to use his telekinesis to affect the results of the gambling tables in Las Vegas.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A toy telephone becomes the link between a young boy and his dead grandmother.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A pioneer from a wagon train in 1847 sets off to find something for his ill son and stumbles into present-day New Mexico.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After successfully stealing a gold shipment, a group of criminals and their scientist accomplice put themselves in suspended animation in a remote desert cave. When they awaken decades later, complications ensue when their truck is destroyed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Annoyed by a club member's constant chatter, a man bets him he cannot remain silent for a year, living in a glass enclosure in the club basement.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Adam Grant is trapped in a recurring nightmare, in which he is sentenced to death and executed.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Using the power of mind over matter, Archibald Beechcroft remakes the world to his own specifications.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Following a frantic phone call about a crashed spaceship, two policeman try and determine who among the passengers of a bus at a snowed-in roadside diner is from another world.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: In a future totalitarian society, a librarian is declared obsolete and sentenced to death.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A man and a woman, on opposite sides of a future war, encounter each other in a deserted town.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A plane lands safely, but the pilot, crew and all of its passengers are missing!

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: When a nuclear attack appears imminent, several suburban friends and neighbors fight over control of a single bomb shelter.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: On the road home from the Civil War, a Confederate soldier stops at a burned-out house and gets to know the owner, a recent widow.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Championship pool player Fats Brown returns from the grave for one last game.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: After a poor but ambitious Central American farm worker overthrows his country's tyrannical leader, he believes he sees assassins everywhere. A look in the mirror reveals his most dangerous enemy.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Before he died, notorious gunslinger Pinto Sykes put a curse on hired-gun Conny Miller. Miller returns to town and is challenged to visit the grave of Sykes, despite the curse.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: Little Anthony Fremont controls an entire town with his ability to read minds and make people do as he wishes.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: A former Nazi SS Captain returns to the ruins of a concentration camp to reminisce and is met by one of his victims.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone
programme.desc: The Earth's orbit has been changed, drawing ever closer to the sun and promising imminent destruction.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The heroes experience Halloween in the Commonwealth; Daryl and Rosita undergo military training led by Mercer; Carol investigates Ezekiel's medical condition.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene looks for Stephanie after she mysteriously goes missing; Connie investigates a story on Trooper Davis; Carol helps Hornsby with a labor dispute at a drug farm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Aaron and Maggie meet Gov. Pamela Milton as she tours Alexandria, Oceanside and Hilltop; Ezekiel finds himself lucky during a routine checkup; Eugene processes Max's story.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help a stranger from another community called Riverbend; they run into Aaron, who tells them about a mission he embarked on with Gabriel as emissaries for the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie, Lydia and Elijah help Aaron and Gabriel on a rescue mission; in the chaos, Negan finds himself watching over Hershel; Sebastian coerces Daryl and Rosita into pulling a heist.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Hornsby marches Daryl and troops to confront Maggie at Hilltop; after a harrowing heist, Rosita gets Connie, Kelly, Eugene, and Max to investigate the Miltons; Ezekiel helps hospital patients in need.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Maggie prepares to defend Hilltop and the people of Riverbend against Hornsby; Hornsby hires Leah to kill Maggie.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Negan rush to the Commonwealth to stop Hornsby from going after their families; Pamela deals with protestors demanding justice for Sebastian's crimes; Mercer needs Rosita's help to fight a swarm.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Carol makes a deal with Pamela to wipe the slate clean on behalf of her friends; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah get on the road to Oceanside to fill them in on a plan; the Commonwealth celebrates Founders Day.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene goes on the run after the Founders Day incident; Pamela tasks Mercer to investigate his whereabouts, to Max and Princess' dismay; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah encounter an unusual complication at an abandoned Renaissance Faire.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol investigate the whereabouts of their friends after Pamela disappears them from the Commonwealth; Pamela asks Yumiko to prosecute Eugene on behalf of the Commonwealth.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Separated from their children, Maggie, Gabriel and Rosita track a military convoy to a mysterious destination; Ezekiel, Kelly, Negan and Annie find themselves at a work site; Daryl and Carol follow a train that has taken Connie aboard.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Ezekiel and Negan team up to lead a clandestine labor revolt against the warden; Aaron, Jerry, Lydia and Elijah catch up with Luke and Jules fleeing Oceanside; Eugene stands trial with Yumiko as his defense attorney.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: The Alexandrians and the prisoners head back to the Commonwealth to confront Pamela Milton; a swarm approaches the city.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl and Carol rush Judith to the hospital; Rosita, Eugene and Gabriel search for Coco; Maggie and Negan take arms against Pamela; as the citizens of the Commonwealth deal with the herd, the heroes assemble for one last stand to save their future.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Una desaparición misteriosa pone en peligro los planes para el futuro de Rick y divide al grupo mientras construyen un puente.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: La visión de Rick de un futuro civilizado se ve amenazada por un cúmulo de traiciones y agravios pasados que nunca fueron vengados ni perdonados.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Rick se ve obligado a enfrentar el pasado en su intento por proteger a las comunidades y el futuro que Carl y él concibieron.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Seis años después de la desaparición de Rick, un grupo recién llegado a Alexandria, liderados por la temperamental Magna, genera problemas a los habitantes de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Eugene está solo y en peligro, perseguido por una horda de zombis que, aparentemente, hablan. Mientras tanto, Michonne guía al grupo de Magna hasta Hilltop, donde esperan ser aceptados como nuevos miembros de la comunidad.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Jesus y Aaron encuentran a Eugene, pero la horda de zombis parlantes los persigue incansablemente. Entretanto, en Alexandria, Negan escapa de su confinamiento porque a Gabriel se le olvida cerrar la puerta de su celda.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Los grupos individuales están convencidos de que pueden construir un futuro mejor por separado, pero la pérdida de un miembro los lleva a unir fuerzas. Se revela una amenaza perturbadora y peligrosa.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl libera a Henry porque le estaba contando demasiadas cosas a Lydia y, después, interroga a la adolescente sobre su grupo. Entetanto, el grupo de Magna desobedece a Tara y se adentra por la noche en el bosque en busca de Luke.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: El grupo de salvajes que lidera Alpha ataca Hilltop para recuperar a su hija. Mientras tanto, una misión en busca de suministros se convierte en una lucha entre la vida y la muerte.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Henry encuentra a Lydia, pero Beta, la mano derecha de Alpha, lo captura. En Alexandria, Michonne discute con el consejo si deben participar en la feria con el resto de las comunidades.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Daryl, Connie, Henry y Lydia se ocultan en un edificio para tenderle una trampa a Beta. Mientras tanto, el Reino sufre la amenaza de un grupo de extorsionistas que patrulla las carreteras y exige dinero a cambio de transitar por ellas.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se descubre el espeluznante origen de las misteriosas cicatrices que Michonne y Daryl lucen en la espalda, el motivo por el cual la actitud de Michonne hacia los forasteros cambió tanto desde la desaparición de Rick.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Por primera vez en años, las cuatro comunidades se reúnen durante la feria que organiza el Reino. Alpha aprovecha la ocasión para infiltrarse de incógnito entre los visitantes de la feria.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: Se desata una tormenta de nieve terrible que sorprende al grupo de Ezekiel viajando hacia Hilltop. Su única esperanza reside en cruzar la frontera que estableció Alpha y acortar el trayecto a través del territorio que tienen prohibido pisar.

programme.title: The Walking Dead
programme.desc: En Oceanside, el grupo continúa entrenando en caso de que los Susurradores regresen. Las tensiones aumentan, mientras los supervivientes tratan de aferrarse a lo que queda en pie de su concepto de civilización.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: A master criminal determines to implant a device in President Grant's brain that will make him respond to the criminal's orders.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.title: The Wild Wild West

programme.desc: West and Gordon Set out to recover the stolen U.S. Constitution from a man using it to bargain for control of border territory.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret agent West is ordered to block a Canadian revolutionary in his scheme to establish a personal empire by violence.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon upset a conspiracy to assassinate the President of Mexico.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon find the evil Dr. Loveless' "corpse," then encounter a fictitious but deadly uncle.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon battle bandits and counter-revolutionaries to recover a prize stallion.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon hunt for a Samurai sword so valuable that its theft could lead to America's loss of grace with the Japanese government.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon brave fires and explosions while following clues to the murder of a rich Kansas rancher.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Agents West and Gordon brave fires and explosions while following clues to the murder of a rich Kansas rancher.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: West and Gordon try to circumvent the theft of Montezuma's treasure by a phony archeological expedition.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Secret Agents James West and Artemus Gordon attempt to stem a tide of counterfeit currency.

programme.title: The Wild Wild West
programme.desc: James West and Artemus Gordon must stop a gargantuan cannon that has turned one town into dust and is now aimed at Denver.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a walkway with fieldstone. Tom shows Kevin how to recognize a quality cabinet and kitchen island. A bathroom gets new black and white tile. Norm boxes in the sunroom ceiling beams.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom pergola is installed. Tom modifies the staircase to match the house’s design. Roger preps garden beds for planting a tall birch and perennials. Tom installs a click-together floor.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: New wireless security systems, marble kitchen-window stool, granite countertops and "His and hers" closets are installed. We see the high-efficiency HVAC system. Tom shows a new "smart lock”.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: In the last episode of the Auburndale project, we review the entire house and the entire team celebrates seven months of hard work with the traditional wrap party on the banks of Charles River.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: This Old House goes Hollywood with the first-ever renovation project in the Los Angeles area. The homeowners plan to renovate their 1933 Spanish Colonial Revival house while keeping its character.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm Abram and Kevin O'Connor stop by one of LA's movie studios to find homeowner Kurt Albrecht at work. In the basement, Richard Trethewey reviews the heating and cooling systems being installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin arrives at the L.A. house to find the custom tiles, windows, and doors. In Griffith Park, Richard sees L.A.’s new water supply infrastructure. Alfonso evaluates the condition of our stucco.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm wrestles with creative details. The stucco system starts on the addition. Kevin sees California modern architecture. Norm shows a formaldehyde-free batt insulation. Kevin meets a tile specialist.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Custom foam forms and the "cat face" plaster technique replicate existing detail in the house. Norm visits cabinetmaker Larry Buckland. The existing roof on the main house will have to be replaced.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Alfonso shows Kevin the last two steps of the stucco system. We see the house’s new period-appropriate ornamental ironwork. The reproduction tile for our project is hand-glazed and goes up inside.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: The 1930s floors are matched with red oak and walnut. The new back terrace, with corbels and tile, is constructed. We see attractive low water plants. Kevin gets a close look at the Hollywood sign.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kitchen cabinets, soapstone countertops, an archway, and a coved ceiling are installed. Richard helps with a pedestal sink. The Juliette balcony and decorative iron balustrade are installed.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: A new custom garage door blends with the period of the house. The front gates are installed. Kevin shows the front yard, hardware, and light fixtures, then visits a spectacular Spanish style house.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Work on the Los Angeles project wraps up with the finishing touches both outside and in. We reveal the space and landscaping. The family congratulates everyone on a job well done.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: TOH TV heads to Bedford, MA, to check out their new project: a colonial-era home. The Homeowners plan to preserve the historic part of the house while adding space and amenities with two additions.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger transplants shrubs and plants from the front. Kevin and Norm remove the front entry porch and clapboards. Tom shows the layout for the new addition. Roger sets up a drain and sump pump system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Mark open up a hole in the old fieldstone foundation. Historic sashes are taken off for rehab. Richard sees the oldest flag in the country. Tom forms the new addition’s foundation out of ICFs.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin finds the walls of the entry addition framed up. Tom creates the connection to the main house. Mark repairs the chimney and the kitchen fireplace gets removed. Norm revisits the Acton Project.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Jenn Nawada shows the landscape plan. Roger removes invasive vines and brambles. Tom raises a new gable wall. Kevin repairs a historic window sill. Norm and Kevin demo the ceiling.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Kevin explains the benefits of using OSB sheathing. Tom removes a cast iron pipe obstructing structural beams. Norm sees our historic window sash repaired. Tom takes down the old wall of the ell.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom adds insulation to the oldest part of the house. Roger gets a lesson in building a cook's garden. Jenn and Roger build raised beds out of old fieldstone. Tom waterproofs the new roof.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom replaces a rotted post. Restored historic window sashes are installed. The garage's electrical service is upgraded. Kevin shows the kitchen's inspiration. Tom removes reveals historic boards.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom installs new red cedar clapboards. Richard helps remove some old kitchen plumbing. Roger installs a new asphalt driveway. Richard shows how he's solving a rough plumbing problem.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Norm and Tom create a historically accurate front door. The ailing American Beech tree gets saved. Kevin shows an antique home. Interior designers share the direction for the new space.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger installs a granite front step and spreads ryegrass on the lawn. Tom installs new wood windows. Norm visits the Colonel James Barrett house. Richard seals and insulates the old ductwork.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Tom and Norm install decorative timbers. Richard shows A/C condensers' concrete mounting pad. Norm visits the Parson Capen House in MA. Tom uses a new hidden deck fastening system.

programme.title: This Old House
programme.desc: Roger creates a winding brick path. Fitting a modern kitchen into an old house. Richard shows a zero-clearance gas fireplace. Norm makes wainscoting out of old boards. White oak floorboards go down.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy enlists the help of JD Brewer to install barn doors framed in angle iron.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy forges a boot blade and makes wooden stools for his kitchen.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Derek From Malden joins Jimmy for a design inspired by fellow Maker Paul Jackman.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy forges a latch for his chicken coop and welds a triple-flip work table from steel.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy builds a burrito guillotine and steel gates for his property.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy makes his first canoe, a 15-ft. Ranger, and learns a lot during the build.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy designs a modular tool shed and makes a table from a 13-ft. cedar slab.

programme.title: Jimmy DiResta: This Old House Makers Channel
programme.desc: Jimmy builds a barn-style doghouse and baseboard window seats for his living room.

programme.title: Isaac Dogboe vs Jessie Magdaleno

programme.title: Juan Manuel Marquez vs Mike Alvarado
programme.desc: On May 17th, 2014, Juan Manuel Marquez fought Mike Alvarado in a WBO Welterweight Title eliminator at The Forum in Inglewood. Both fighters scored a knockdown in the bout, but it was Marquez that prevailed with a unanimous decision victory.

programme.title: Luis Alberto Lopez vs Gabe Flores
programme.desc: On September 10th, 2021, Luis Alberto Lopez fought Gabe Flores in a super featherweight bout in Tucson. In a surprising upset, Lopez won by a convincing unanimous decision.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Julio Ceasar Gonzalez
programme.desc: On July 28th, 2001 Roy Jones Jr and Julio Ceasar Gonzalez battled for IBA, IBF, IBO, WBA and WBC World Light Heavyweight titles at the Staples Center in Los Angeles resulting in a win for Jones with a unanimous decsion.

programme.title: Best of Butterbean

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Shane Mosley
programme.desc: On November 10th. 2007 Miguel Cotto fought Shane Mosley at Madison Square Garden in New York City for the WBA World welterweight title in a full 12 round bout that ended in a unanimous decision victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Mike Tyson vs Lorenzo Canady
programme.desc: On August 15th, 1985 Mike Tyson and Lorenzo Canady fought eachother at Resorts International in Atlantic City that resulted in Tyson defeating Canady in the first round by Knockout.

programme.title: Efe Ajagba vs Brian Howard
programme.desc: On April 10th, 2021 Efe Ajagba faced Brian Howard at the Osage Casino in Tulsa, Ok. With the fight ending by knockout in the third round securing the win for Ajagba.

programme.title: Miguel Cotto vs Sergio Martinez
programme.desc: On June 7th, 2014 Miguel Cotto and Sergio Martinez fought eachother for the WBC world middleweight titles in a bout that ended early in the tenth round with a victory for Cotto.

programme.title: Muhammad Ali vs Joe Frazier 3
programme.desc: On October 1st, 1975, Muhammad Ali and Joe Frazier fought for the third time for the World Heavyweight Title. Known as the "Thrilla in Manila," Ali ultimately emerged as the victor in what is considered one of the greatest boxing matches of all time.

programme.title: Alex Saucedo vs Lenny Zappavigna
programme.desc: On June 30th, 2018 Alex Saucedo fought Lenny Zappavigna for the vacant WBO International Super lightweight title.

programme.title: Donald Curry vs Milton McCrory
programme.desc: On December 6th, 1985, Donald Curry fought Milton McCrory for the WBC, WBA, and IBF Welterweight Titles in Las Vegas. Putting on the pressure early, Donald Curry came out firing, knocking out McCrory in the second round.

programme.title: Jeff Harding vs Dennis Andries
programme.desc: On June 24th, 1989, Jeff Harding fought Dennis Andries for the WBC Light Heavyweight Title in Atlantic City. In an incredible back-and-forth fight with both fighters landing huge power shots, Harding surprisingly stopped Andries in the final round.

programme.title: Oscar De La Hoya vs Pernell Whitaker
programme.desc: On April 12th, 1997, Oscar De La Hoya fought Pernell Whitaker for the WBC Welterweight Title at Thomas & Mack Center in Las Vegas. De La Hoya won by a very controversial decision in a fight that many thought Whitaker had the superior performance.

programme.title: Roy Jones Jr vs Percy Harris
programme.desc: On December 5th, 1992 Roy Jones Jr. fought Percy Harris for the WBC Continental Americas Super Middleweight title at the Trump Taj Mahal in Atlantic city with Jones defeating Harris in the 4th round by technical knockout.

programme.title: Sean O'Grady vs Hilmer Kenty

programme.desc: Dracula, Lycaon of Arcadia, the Beast of Gévaudan; these are the names of grotesque monsters who have reared their terrifying heads throughout history, unearthly creatures that thrived on human blood and flesh.

programme.title: The UnXplained
programme.desc: A miraculous meteorite falling from the heavens and a chunk of sandstone considered so sacred that wars have been fought to protect it; throughout history, many have insisted that simple stones can do everything from choosing a king to causing death.

programme.title: The UnXplained

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: It's the battle of generations as Tameka and Niq Niq face off in a competition to see who's the better dancer. Meanwhile, Tip takes the kids to a skate park in an effort to teach Domani how to face his fears. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Major's first day of pre-school approaches, Auntie Precious feels like it's time to move on. Tameka isn't quite ready to let her leave the Harris home and devises a plan to keep her around. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Shekinah acts unprofessional during the taping of Tameka's talk show pilot, Tameka worries Shekinah's attitude could jeopardize her hustle. Tameka insists she spend time with an etiquette coach but will it be enough? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Domani is hired for his first paid gig but when he tells Tip he's intimidated by him, Tip has to decide whether or not to go to Domani's performance. Meanwhile, Tameka takes the kids horseback riding but Major is nervous. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Tip's probation coming to a close, it's time to go full hustle on promoting his new album with a big celebration bash. Tameka takes King to a meeting for his own pajama line, but the two have some creative differences. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Christmas around the corner, the kids are making their lists and checking them twice. But as the Christmas list grows, T.I.¹s concerned the kids don¹t know how much work goes into paying for their gifts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After the release of his most recent album, T.I. decides to pack up and take the family on a winter adventure. But new to the ski slopes anything could happen with this family as they try to tackle the mountains of Big Bear, CA. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Major is becoming a little man and it's time for him to get his own bed. King struggles with understanding the difference between the reality of his own life and the allure of his dad's. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah tells Tameka raising kids isn't hard, Tameka challenges her to take care of the Harris children for a day. Meanwhile, Tip and Tameka use the opportunity to step out and have fun. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Spring Break around the corner, Tameka convinces Tip to take the family to the West Coast for a beach vacation. Meanwhile, a controversial love letter is found in King's backpack causing the entire family to weigh in. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Shekinah is trying to move up in the hair industry and hopes a booth at the world famous Bronner Bros. hair show will help take her there. With Tip and Tameka out of town, will Shekinah be able to keep it classy? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip sees Major spending more time with his video games than his friends, Tip decides to set up a play date. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Major asks Tip to be in his new music video for his single "Hello" with CeeLo Green, Tip decides to incorporate the entire family. Will the kids be up to the challenge?

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: With Messiah turning thirteen and entering into young adulthood, Tip encourages Messiah to go on his very first date. But in typical Harris family fashion, going solo is a no-no, so the whole family comes along for the ride. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Tip finds an incriminating text on Niq Niq's phone, he sets out with Major to get to the bottom of things. Later, Tameka encourages Shekinah to join an improv group and sends the funniest person she knows to join her, King. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka's brother Lil' Red stops by the house and asks King to join his grandfather's group, The Tams for a night. Meanwhile, Tip joins Deyjah in a baking class to perfect the homemade cupcake.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Shekinah moves into her new home, Tameka convinces her she needs home owner's boot camp. Back at the house, Tip is discouraged by his kids' lack of basketball skills and sets up a game with NBA star Josh Smith. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Fed up with Shekinah always saying she wants to be white, Tameka suggests they spend the day doing things white people do. Meanwhile, Tip discovers inappropriate pictures on his kids' social media accounts. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After attending their first NASCAR event, Tip and Tameka argue over who's the better driver. With each of their personal cars on the line, the whole family joins in on the competition. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: King, Major, and Precious are hired for their first paid gig at the circus. Under pressure, will the kids step up to the challenge? Meanwhile, Messiah and Domani try to use Tip's know how to start their own fashion line. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: Tameka and Shekinah decide to make a unique workout video for people who don't like to work out. Meanwhile, Tip takes the boys to LA for some business and pleasure. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: When Domani and King come home with less than stellar report cards, Tip takes matters into his own hands and hires them a tutor. Meanwhile, Tameka prepares her new girl group French Kiss for their first paid gig. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: As Tip heads out for the first leg of his two-month long nationwide tour with Lil' Wayne, the kids aren't ready for him to go and convince him to let them come.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In the third season finale, Tip decides to take the family to Puerto Rico for a much needed getaway. Meanwhile, Tameka meets up with Niq Niq and the OMG Girlz as they embark on their newest tour.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In an attempt to find out more about his daughter's lives, Tip participates in something he wouldn't normally do. But as the girls start to dish the details, is Tip ready to hear what they have to say? Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: After Messiah and Domani rescue Precious from an asthma attack, Tip makes sure the kids have proper training for any emergency situation. Meanwhile, Tameka and Shekinah head off to a retreat and put their friendship to the test. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: T.I. and Tiny: The Family Hustle
programme.desc: In an effort to teach their family about teamwork, Tip and Tameka take the kids to Space Camp. But when the kids have a difficult time working together, their mission becomes jeopardized. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie invites some ladies of the league to meet and plan an event, but as the new girls get to know each other, the claws come out, and when the focus turns to Draya, it all goes left. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Brittish is determined to give it another shot and throws a "Turkish Tea Party" for the group. Meanwhile, Brandi's time to have another baby is running out, so she and her husband Jason seek the help of a fertility specialist. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Things are getting serious with Draya and her boyfriend Orlando Scandrick, but Jackie's daughter has news that may rock Draya's world. Meanwhile, Brittish's fiancé Lorenzo Gordon gets advice from Jackie's husband, Doug Christie. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Draya confronts her boyfriend about accusations of possible infidelity with Jackie's daughter, Chantel. Jackie's gala event falls apart when almost none of her friends show up and Brittish gets into an altercation with Malaysia. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: With the group still reeling from the effects of Jackie's event, Sundy decides the ladies need a getaway to Palm Springs—but for the good of the group, Brittish is not invited. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The Palm Springs getaway is anything but relaxing as tensions between Draya and Sundy erupt into full-blown mayhem. And in a tearful confession, Draya tells Jackie her daughter may not be as innocent as she thinks. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie develops a bottle for the cognac brand she hopes to launch. As payback for Palm Springs, Draya hosts all the ladies at an excruciating Mud Run. And Jackie forces a meeting with Draya to clear her daughter's name. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Jackie and Chantel are over the situation with Draya and her boyfriend, but Draya and Orlando aren't done yet-- they confront the ladies in an attempt to put the issue to rest. Jackie invites the group on a trip to France. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: The ladies head to France to launch Jackie's cognac, but divisions in the group threaten to spoil the trip and may be the end of Jackie and Malaysia's friendship. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: While in France, Jackie launches her cognac, Brittish gets a surprise present from her fiancé, Lorenzo, and Sundy's attempt to reconcile Malaysia and Jackie takes a nasty turn that ends up splintering the entire group. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Basketball Wives LA
programme.desc: Join us for the most dramatic Reunion Special yet! Things get heated with Sundy and Brandi. Jackie reveals her thoughts about the Orlando/ Draya/ Chantel love triangle and one cast member refuses to share the stage with the girls. Presented by VH1.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: When basketball phenom Shareef loses to his brother in a hoops game, Shaunie suggests a rematch with the siblings, which leads to a house divided. Keyonna wants to be a mother, yet when faced with roadblocks, she realizes nothing in life is a slam dunk.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court
programme.desc: Myles no longer appreciates his living situation and yearns to move out. When Keyonna feels as though she's being taken for granted by being forced to work on her day off, Shaunie finds herself not only teaching a lesson, but learning one as well.

programme.title: Shaunie's Home Court

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Everyone's got a problem with David McLane after last week's Championship Challenge Match. David placates the angry roster by offering all participants a chance at the new champion - who's more than willing to face each of them.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After two groundbreaking wins, Champion Abilene Maverick finally re-introduces herself to the WOW audience. Backstage, as teams start to assemble for The WOW Trios Tournament, Team Spirit has a major announcement with major ramifications.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With Amber O'Neal by her side, Jessie Jones makes her intentions towards former tag partner Americana crystal clear. With Amber by her side, however, Jessie might just provoke another former WOW Superhero to step up. Gloria Glitter aims to make a stance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Lana Star and The Fab Four aim to be back on top with the gold this week in Penelope Pink's Main Event Championship Match against WOW Champion Abilene Maverick.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The WOW Trios Tournament officially kicks off as Team Spirit and Team IQ Superior both look to pick up the first win and advance.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The next Tag Team Championship Match is on everybody's minds as The Tonga Twins set up a Fatal Four Way Main Event to determine their next challenger. The Trios Tournament continues as Stephy Slays and The Mighty Mights face a fractured Team Exile.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: There's no stopping Americana as she challenges Jessie Jones to a one-on-one contest in The Main Event, despite concerns from Santana Garrett. The Brat Pack is joined by an intriguing third member as they enter the first round of the Trios Tournament.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Last Call demands a championship match against The Tonga Twins. Las Bandidas and Tormenta hope that Latin Power can stand tall in their first trios tournament match against The Mighty Mights and Keta Rush.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: It's finally time for Princess Aussie's singles match against WOW World Champion Abilene Maverick as the Australian tries to prove that she'll never give up chasing her dream.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Coach Campanelli addresses the fallout from last week's Trios Tournament Match, and Team Spirit's path forward as the tournament continues with Tormenta and Las Bandidas facing Team Exile in the next semi final match.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Fab Four are incensed to find out that because of their constant attacks on The Mother Truckers, David McLane has granted Big Rig Betty and Holly Swag a Main Event tag team match against Penelope Pink and Vickie Lynn McCoy.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Jessie Jones and Amber O'Neal have a new look, but it's make or break for The All American Girls as they call their shot against them for the Main Event.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The VIP Abilene Maverick is firmly in The Beast's crosshairs as The Beast finally gets the rematch she's been waiting on for weeks, and a chance to reclaim the WOW World Championship that she never lost.

programme.title: WOW - Women of Wrestling: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The Beast demands justice after taking a loss in the WOW World Championship Match in the last episode of WOW.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A journalist from Boston accompanies Josh on his manhunt to get an exclusive story on a bounty hunter as part of a series of articles.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh feels compelled to repay a debt to an old friend who's in jail and may hang.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in outlaw Carlos Domingo but he has to be released when the witness against him is killed in front of Josh.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is sent for by Sheriff Mike Strata and the desperate men of Coronado.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh brings in a young man wanted for robbery but loses his reward and expenses.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh arrives in a town for rest and to gamble just as the local bank has been robbed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A widow wants to hire/propose to Josh so she doesn't lose custody of her son.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: A woman asks Josh, an old friend, to help find her husband Frank - a bounty hunter out to settle a score.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When Randall has a sheriff bed a prisoner, the man's gang kidnaps the sheriff and two others and threatens to kill one per day until the man is freed.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: In Mexico, Josh is hired to protect a sensible man and his pregnant wife from his father-in-law and the villagers who are angered when he refuses the town healing woman or \\"witch\\".

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: After Josh reluctantly takes the task of finding a man and his wife's pet ewe, he becomes the butt of many jokes in the community while cattlemen nearly hang him when he mentions sheep.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: When a convicted killer escapes prison, Josh is hired for $500 to protect the woman whose testimony put him there.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh rides into a town looking for a man who asked him to come there for a job that pays $500.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is hired by Harry Weaver to track down his twin brother Pete, who's wanted with a $500 bounty on him.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh is called in to track down a new outlaw - the local sheriff who is a friend.

programme.title: Wanted: Dead or Alive
programme.desc: Josh reluctantly takes a job protecting a beautiful deaf, mute, teenage girl and keeping everyone off the father's place for a day or two.

programme.desc: Spring brings a rush of warm weather and the big melt begins. The road is nearly empty as only the toughest or craziest truckers remain. There's a race to the finish between Alex, Hugh, Jay, and T.J.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: From its geological history going back millions of years to the origins of the indigenous Eskimos that have inhabited the land for hundreds of years, this one-hour special will examine in depth the changes that have taken place in Yellowknife.

programme.title: Ice Road Truckers
programme.desc: The truckers look back at their experiences during the last ice road season and explain what they do now that they're off the ice. Tensions are sure to be high as both Rick and Drew have not spoken to Hugh since leaving the ice roads prematurely.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: As the season reaches the halfway mark, logging country is feeling the pressure. In Florida, Swilley gets hooked in a pile of rusty metal.

programme.title: Ax Men
programme.desc: Logging country is coming unglued. Rygaard is a war zone when the battle between chasers threatens to tear apart the entire crew. At Papac Alaska, Joe and Coatsy let the fists fly.

programme.title: Ax Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Mountain Men

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Swamp People

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The past is quickly becoming perilous as the fearless bandit king Bakura has invaded the Pharaoh's palace to take down the keepers of the seven Millennium Items single-handedly!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Even with the potent power of Obelisk the Tormentor, the Pharaoh couldn't prevent the bandit Bakura from escaping. Everyone knows that thief will return for a rematch, so Seto has a plan to create a powerful army.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad vows to stop the bandit king Bakura's sneak attacks once and for all, but he may have made a promise he can't keep!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Mahad, the first of the Pharaoh's guardians, has fallen. Even worse, the bandit king Bakura now has the Millennium Ring, making his Diabound even more unstoppable!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The origins of the Millennium Items are revealed! Who forged these powerful artifacts, and why were they created? Though the Millennium Items are powerful, such power comes with a heavy price... a debt that may never be able to be repaid!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh calls forth the mighty Egyptian God Slifer the Sky Dragon to fight the bandit Bakura's Diabound, but when Diabound starts attacking the townspeople, the Pharaoh must protect them, even if it means sacrificing himself!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The bandit Bakura has stolen the Millennium Puzzle and sent the Pharaoh plummeting into the abyss. Now he's another step closer to obtaining all seven Millennium Items and resurrecting the malevolent Zorc, the greatest evil of all time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and the Pharaoh are reunited, but the Pharaoh is powerless without the Millennium Puzzle! However, that won't stop the Pharaoh from a final showdown against the bandit king Bakura.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: It's the showdown in the sands between the bandit Bakura and his ever-growing Diabound versus the Pharaoh, Mahad the Dark Magician, and the remaining guardians of the Pharaoh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: With the help of his father's spirit, the Pharaoh and his guardians defeated the bandit Bakura's Diabound and stopped the horrible Zorc from resurrecting... or did they?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh's journey was more than a trip to the past, it's the greatest Shadow Game ever created. Yami Yugi and Yami Bakura's Shadow Game has already reached apocalyptic proportions, but it's only the beginning of cataclysmic events!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Zorc's incredible shadow energies have resurrected the bandit Bakura and his Diabound. With a second chance at revenge, the bandit king has broken up the Pharaoh's team so that he can divide and conquer them one at a time!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The hope of mankind rests on Yugi's shoulders as he arrives at the final temple chamber where the Pharaoh's name is located, but something unexpected is waiting for them - a sinister surprise that can cost them their lives!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: After a nearly eternal slumber, the all-powerful Zorc has resurrected, plunging the world into darkness!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and his guardians are down to their last line of defense as Shada falls victim to Zorc. The Pharaoh desperately wants to summon the three Egyptian Gods, but he can't without his Millennium Puzzle!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Exodia the Forbidden One couldn't defeat Zorc! Exodia was able to buy enough time for the Pharaoh to get his Millennium Puzzle back-he can now summon the almighty Egyptian Gods! It's time for the Pharaoh's counterattack in the biggest brawl.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The three Egyptian Gods have been defeated. The Pharaoh is severely hurt and unable to stop Zorc from setting fire to the city, but our heroes aren't giving up. It's not double vision when Seto and Kaiba transcend time to confront Zorc.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: The Pharaoh and Kaiba's combined strength couldn't defeat Zorc. Yugi must give the Pharaoh his name, but Yugi doesn't know how to read ancient Egyptian text. All bets are off in the final clash where Yugi must protect the past to save the future!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pharaoh Atem, Yugi, and friends have defeated the bandit Bakura and Zorc, but the final test still awaits! Yugi must duel Atem! As they set sail to the final dueling grounds, everyone realizes this may be the final night Yugi and Atem have together.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: If Yugi defeats Atem, Yugi will prove he's ready to stand on his own, and Atem can join his friends in the world beyond. But Yugi and Atem will be separated forever.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem has summoned all three Egyptian Gods! What chance does Yugi have against these powerful creatures that no one has been able to defeat? Yugi better think of a strategy quickly or this duel will be over soon!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Atem still has all three Egyptian God Cards, Yugi doesn't have a single monster on the field! Yugi claims that he has a combo that will defeat the Egyptian Gods, but is he simply bragging, or does he actually have a plan?

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi and Atem - more than friends, closer than brothers. Will they stay together, or is it time to say goodbye? It's the final answer, the final duel, and the final time we will see our friends in the rousing conclusion to Yu-Gi-Oh!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: When the #1 ranked duelist and ruthless tycoon, Seto Kaiba, kidnaps Yugi's Grandpa to get the rare Blue-Eyes White Dragon card, Yugi must face Kaiba in the ultimate Duel Monsters showdown!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi is forced to face Duel Monsters creator, Maximillion Pegasus, in the mysterious Shadow Realm where all the monsters and magic are real. If Yugi loses, Pegasus claims Grandpa's soul as his prize!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Yugi gives up one of his own Star Chips so Joey can board the boat bound for Duelist Kingdom and duel to save his sister's eyesight. Meanwhile, the cheat Weevil tries to cripple Yugi's deck by tossing his best cards overboard!

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh!
programme.desc: Pegasus announces that there are many strange secrets that will make his ultimate tournament unlike any they've ever had. Yugi must not only figure the rules out, but master them if he's to survive!

programme.title: Top Wing

programme.desc: New lifeguard David Hasselhawg teaches the Cadets important life-saving skills, but the Cadets have to go and rescue Davey; Survivor Bear leads a tour, but finds himself in need of a "Top Wing" rescue.
